meaning: n.[生化]肌动球蛋白,肌纤凝蛋白
examples: The effects of trehalose on actomyosin of salted pike eel muscle were first investigated.
A muscle is a very large number of fibers close together, containing two different substances myosin and actomyosin.
A protein found in muscle cells that, together with actin, forms actomyosin, which provides the contractile mechanism of muscle tissue.
